title: molinia caerulea
intro: Molinia caerulea, also known as purple moor-grass, is a perennial grass species that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Molinia caerulea include its potential to help with wound healing, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues.
